title: chrysaspis dubia
intro: Chrysaspis dubia, also known as the 'Golden Plant', is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Chrysaspis dubia is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Chrysaspis dubia is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
